findings.project_classification: University coursework (Plymouth PUSL2023 Group 147) — Flutter mobile app, monolith, Dart/Flutter

findings.gap_analysis: 7 major proposed features NOT implemented: item listing/browsing, search, item details page, contact poster, date field, user-item association, view posted items in profile
